query:
-- Look for book_profiles with combined author names
SELECT id, bookTitle, authorName, enrichedAt IS NOT NULL as enriched
FROM book_profiles
WHERE authorName LIKE '% and %' 
   OR authorName LIKE '% & %'
ORDER BY authorName
LIMIT 30;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 46FBtXPMNF6LwZ8.root --database ehSrGoKN2NYhXg8UYLtWGw --execute
